series_metadata.series_title: FULL PUBLIC RECORDS OF ENFORCEMENT ACTIONS
series_metadata.series_description: Board Order or Consent Agreement plus underlying investigation correspondence and materials documenting the Board''s activites not excluded from public records law.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: paper copy action becomes public; entire paper file scanned digital file on Board storage device and back-up device; Paper file destroyed staff determines digital file''s integrity. ; Electronic: digital file death of licensee unless under court order longer
